titleStmt.title: SII 22.196: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 196. (A.R. No. 196 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, GRĀMAM. ŚIVALŌKANĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE ŚELVĀMBIKĀ SHRINE. JAṬ. SUNDARA-PĀṆḌYA I—18th YEAR (A.D. 1268-69).

summary.p: The inscription begins with the Sanskrit praśasti of the king, Samastajagad-ādhāra etc. The record is damaged. It seems to register an endowment of land made by the king for the expenses of worship and offerings to the deity on the day of a special festival instituted in his name, and for the formation of a garden where the god was to be taken in procession on such occasions. Provision is also made for the daily supply of 200 lotus flowers to the temple and of 2000 lilies on festival days by the grant of 2(1/4) vēli of land to one Vikrama-Pāṇḍyaṉ alias Śrī Mūlasthāna-Vēḷāṉ for the purpose. The god is called Śrīyāṟṟuttaḷi Mūlasthānam-Uḍaiyār Bokkaṇaṅkuḍuttaruḷiya-Nāyanār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samasta jagatādhāra somakulatilaka madhurāpurimādhava keraḷavamśa nirmūlana la[ṅkādvipaviluṇṭha]na
śailakuliśa ka[rṇṇāṭa] rājavidrāvaṇa
hārājādhirāja parameśvara śrī sundarapāṇḍyadeva 2 tribhuvaṉa cakravartti koneriṉmai koṇṭāṉ śrīsundara
pāṇḍyadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 8- vatu naṭuvil maṇṭalattu tirumuṉaippāṭi nāṭṭu grāmattu Uṭaiyār śrīyāṟṟuttaḷi mulasthāna
muṭaiyār pokkaṇaṅ kuṭuttaruḷiya nāyaṉār koyil tānattāṟku Innāyaṉā(ā)ṟku namperāl kaṭṭiṉa sundarapāṇḍyaṉ tiru
nāḷ Eḻuntaruḷi Eṟi Aruḷun tiruttoppuc ceyyavum pūcaikkum tiruppaṇikkum tirunāmattukkāṇi Iṟaiyiliyāka viṭṭa
kāṭavarātittaṉ peruvaḻikku kiḻakku peṇṇaiyāṟṟukku teṟku taraippiḷḷaiyār koyilukku meṟku
Innāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa patiṉeḻāva
yum mutalāyaṅkaḷuṭpaṭa Aṉupavikkavum Iṉnāyaṉār tevatāṉa meṟku Oṉṟekāl veliyum muṉṉāḷ paḻaṅkuṭi
yum niṅkalāṉa nilam Oru veliyum Āka nilam Iraṇṭekāl veliyum vikramapāṇḍyanāṉa śrīmūlasthāṉa veḷāṉ kāṇiyāka kaikkoṇṭu
Innilattukku nāḷukku kaṭamaiyum nāḷ Oṉṟukku Iraṇṭāyiram veḷḷai ṟu tiruppaḷittāmamum Irunūṟu ceṅkaḻunir tiruttāmamum Iṭṭu I
tukku Iṟaiyiliāka Aṉupavikkac coṉṉom yiṉnilam veli yum tirumaṭaiviḷaākattukkum tiruviḷakkukku Uṭalākavum A
Iṟaiyiliyāka Ivāṇṭumutal kaikkoṇṭu candrāditaval celvatāka tantom Ippaṭikku Olaiyum kaikkoṇṭu kalli
lum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷka Ivai taccaneṉmali ḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 22.196 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
